data.location: Former Driving Test Centre, Cayton Low Road, Eastfield, Scarborough, North Yorkshire
data.short_description: Aldi is progressing plans for a new food store in Eastfield, Scarborough after a setback when North Yorkshire Council rejected its prior notification for demolition of two buildings. The application was submitted to North Yorkshire Council in June 2025 following community consultation, with over 94% of 255 responses in favour.

data.location: Bath Road, Melksham, Wiltshire (existing store); Eastern Way, Melksham, Wiltshire (proposed new site)
data.short_description: Lidl has unveiled plans to relocate its Melksham store from Bath Road to a larger 2,184 sq m site on 1.9 hectares of farmland near Eastern Way, 1.8km from the town centre. The proposed new store would be over a third larger than the existing one, with 132 parking spaces and 384 roof-mounted solar panels, and is pending approval by Wiltshire Council.

data.location: 3260 N. U.S. Highway 17-92, Longwood (in the old Happy Teriyaki space)
data.short_description: Nazca Lines Restaurant, a Peruvian concept with a custom-designed kitchen and heritage-rooted menu, will open next month in the old Happy Teriyaki space in Longwood. The menu will include lomo saltado, seco a la limeña, and ají de gallina, with former Off the Hook chef Santiago Gomero serving as executive chef.

data.location: 3863 E. Colonial Drive, Colonialtown (in the old Noodles & Co. space)
data.short_description: Michi Ramen & Hibachi and Tsaocha, which offers bubble tea, fried chicken, and egg waffles, has opened in the former Noodles & Co. space at 3863 E. Colonial Drive in Colonialtown.

Azal Coffee will offer Yemeni, Saudi, and Turkish coffees, teas, fruit drinks, desserts, and pastries at 150 Cranes Roost Blvd. in Altamonte Springs. This location joins three other Azal coffee houses in Dearborn, MI; Milwaukee, WI; and Flushing, Queens.

data.location: 34 E. Main St., Apopka (in the old Pretty in Pink Tea Room space)
data.short_description: Don Patron Bar Bistro Lounge will open this summer in the former Pretty in Pink Tea Room space at 34 E. Main St. in Apopka. The restaurant promises an "electrifying vibe" with live DJ sets on weekends and an indulgent menu featuring wagyu sliders, lobster quesadillas, and chimichurri NY strip.

data.location: Near Seminole Towne Center, Sanford (in the old Hooters building)
data.short_description: Hooked Fish Camp, a new venture from F&D Restaurant Concepts, has opened in the old Hooters building near the Seminole Towne Center in Sanford. The seafood restaurant offers a sizable menu of Southern-leaning dishes.
N/A

data.location: 2208 W Morrison Ave, South Tampa (Hyde Park area)
data.status: serve its last meal on May 21
data.short_description: Haven restaurant in South Tampa will serve its last meal on May 21, with Bern's Steak House Group citing the end of "a successful and well-loved run." The closure comes after months of planning to make way for a new seafood concept called Peddler + Potter Oyster House.

Peddler + Potter Oyster House, a new seafood concept from Bern's Steak House Group, is planned for the space currently occupied by Haven at 2208 W Morrison Ave. The restaurant will feature a daily-changing seafood menu, a raw bar with Florida oysters, an open kitchen, and an extensive wine program building on Bern's foundation.

Butler Food Center, a longtime community grocery store that had been owned by three generations of the Kaiser family for 62 years before being sold in July 2023, appears to have closed after new owners ran into financial difficulties. The mayor confirmed at a council meeting that the store is "done" and in foreclosure, with one owner having allegedly liquidated assets and fled the country.

data.location: Times Square, New York City (Address not specified)
data.short_description: Kitchen + Kocktails, a Dallas-based soul food restaurant owned by Kevin Kelley, is expanding to New York City's Times Square this summer. The restaurant offers elevated comfort food including shrimp and grits, chicken and waffles, and jerk lamb chops, and currently has six other locations across the country.
A second expansion location of Kitchen + Kocktails is also set to open in Boston this summer, per the restaurant's website.
N/A
N/A

Cowboy Connection, a cowboy apparel store in Boiling Springs, SC, has announced it is closing after 30 years in business. The owners shared the announcement on social media, noting there will be significant deals during the wind-down period.

data.status: grand opening scheduled at 11 a.m. Monday
data.short_description: Saucy! by KFC opened its first Manatee County location at 5484 Lena Road in Bradenton, near State Road 70 and Interstate 75. The restaurant features chicken tenders, sauces, sandwiches, desserts, and beverages, and is part of KFC's expansion of the Saucy! concept, which already has four locations in the Tampa Bay area.
N/A
N/A
N/A
Wild Ocean Sushi and Bar has opened in Colonial Heights, offering a hybrid dining concept with an all-you-can-eat buffet and unlimited menu items.
N/A
N/A
N/A
N/A

data.location: The Charter Hotel, Downtown Seattle (near Pike Place Market and Elliott Bay; Address not specified)
data.short_description: Cinder + Salt held its grand opening celebration at The Charter Hotel in downtown Seattle, offering a coastal kitchen concept with a wood-fired grill, raw bar, seafood towers, and Pacific Northwest-sourced menu. Executive Chef Johnnie Williams leads the kitchen, which features wood-grilled octopus, prime steaks, fresh oysters, and Dungeness crab.

The Smokey Bones Bar and Grill at 5555 Whittlesey Blvd. in Columbus has permanently closed after 20 years, per signage posted on the building's front door. Parent company Fat Brands Inc. filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in January after accruing over $1 billion in debt, and the chain has closed multiple locations across the nation.

data.location: 1230 State Street, Santa Barbara, CA (near the Granada Theatre)
data.status: in the process of transferring liquor license / opening for another month plus
data.short_description: Pascucci, a 33-year Italian restaurant staple in Santa Barbara, is relocating from its lower State Street location to 1230 State Street near the Granada Theatre under a new name and concept. Owner Laura Knight stated the restaurant will remain open at least another month while the liquor license transfer is in progress, with a planned reopening targeting theatre-district diners.

data.location: Walt Whitman Shops, Huntington Station (Address not specified)
data.short_description: Rocco's Tacos & Tequila Bar, a casual Mexican chain with nine Florida locations, will open its first Long Island restaurant at the Walt Whitman Shops in Huntington Station in early December. The chain was founded by Long Island native Rocco Mangel and serves Mexican and Tex-Mex dishes including tacos, enchiladas, molcajetes, burritos, and bowls.

data.status: will be located / opening in the new year
data.short_description: JINYA Ramen Bar is bringing its signature slow-simmered broths to Long Island, with the Lake Grove location at 3190 Middle Country Road set to open in the new year. The space will feature outdoor seating with a firepit and a private dining room for special events.

Toastique, a Washington D.C.-based gourmet toast, juice, and coffee bar brand, is planning to open in Woodbury at 8027 Jericho Turnpike this winter. The Woodbury outpost will be the brand's third New York location, operated by local franchisees Chris and Andrea Pedersen.

The Pour Authority, described as Long Island's first self-pour beer garden and eatery, is almost ready to open on Main Street in Farmingdale. The eatery will occupy a 3,600 square foot space at 303 Main St. with 40 beers on tap.

data.location: Multiple locations: Wilmington, Knoxville, Johnstown, Ramsey, MN, St. George, Tucson, Milford (addresses not specified)
data.short_description: Campers Inn RV is holding a company-wide grand opening event May 14–17 to mark the rebranding and integration of multiple former Lazydays locations, alongside the reopening of the reimagined Tampa flagship as Lazydays Powered by Campers Inn RV. The event includes coordinated festivities across all newly rebranded and existing Campers Inn locations, with a free RV giveaway on May 16.
N/A

data.location: 71 South Main St., Newtown, CT (former Eggs & Co. space)
data.status: has opened / ribbon-cutting ceremony on May 18
data.short_description: jjStacks, a bar and grill featuring stacked burgers and more than 100 varieties of wings, has opened at 71 South Main St. in Newtown in the former Eggs & Co. space. A ribbon-cutting ceremony is scheduled for 2 p.m. on May 18; this is the brand's first brick-and-mortar location, owned by Joe Attonito who previously operated the Stacks Mobile food truck.
N/A

data.location: Uptown/South End area, Charlotte, NC (near light rail's Carson Station; Address not specified)
data.status: opening in May / in the final stages of construction and inspections
data.short_description: Market on Morehead, a full-service restaurant and bar with seating for 200 indoors and 150 outdoors, is opening in Charlotte in May at the edge of uptown and South End near the light rail's Carson Station. The restaurant is a sister spot to Market on Main in Columbia, SC, and features a 25-foot LED Jumbotron screen, Rail Trail patio views, live music, and a 40-seat bar.
N/A

data.location: Namba district, Osaka, Japan (near Nankai Shin-Imamiya and Namba Stations; Address not specified)
data.short_description: Centara Hotels & Resorts has opened the Centara Life Namba Hotel Osaka in the heart of Osaka's Namba district, marking its second hotel in Japan. The 300-room property features a breakfast buffet dining space, a rooftop lounge called SORA with skyline views, and is positioned steps from Nankai Shin-Imamiya and Namba Stations.

data.location: Airport Road, Mohali, India (Address not specified)
data.short_description: Ramee Group of Hotels has opened its boutique property Ramee Collection Airport Road, Mohali, developed in partnership with Pure Hotel Pvt. Ltd., marking the group's first entry into the Tricity market of Mohali, Chandigarh, and Panchkula. The property is positioned on the Airport Road corridor and focuses on boutique design, elevated dining, and urban connectivity for business and leisure travellers.
Delco is getting its first L.L.Bean store, in a location near where longtime competitor Eddie Bauer previously closed. No further address or opening date details are provided in the article.
This article is a duplicate of Article 32, reporting the same L.L.Bean store coming soon to Delco near the former Eddie Bauer location, with no additional address or date details.
N/A

Sunridge Hotel Group has announced the grand opening of TownePlace Suites by Marriott Thatcher, a 69-suite all-suite hotel at 2777 W. Highway 70, with a ribbon-cutting ceremony scheduled for May 12 from 4 to 7 p.m. The property offers studio and one-bedroom suites with full kitchens and amenities including EV charging stations, a fitness center, patio with fire pit and grills, and a pet-friendly policy.
N/A

data.location: Former Chicago Pizza Express location off Highway 43, Northport, AL (Address not specified)
data.short_description: Martin Pizzeria, a family-owned pizzeria owned by Tommy Martin, has opened in Northport in the former Chicago Pizza Express space off Highway 43 in a shopping center anchored by ALDI. The business is a continuation of a family pizza operation with roots going back to the late 1980s, with an existing location in Gordo, AL.

data.location: 3374 North University Drive, Coral Springs, FL 33065
data.short_description: Big Whiskey's American Restaurant & Bar is expanding to 3374 North University Drive in Coral Springs, FL, with owners targeting a September opening that could move to August if construction stays on track. The location will feature approximately 180 indoor seats, 50–60 patio seats, 37 televisions, and a bar program with 50–100 whiskeys.
N/A

data.location: Lower Hill District, Pittsburgh, PA (adjacent to PPG Paints Arena; Address not specified)
data.short_description: Citizens Live at the Wylie, a new 4,000-capacity live music venue in Pittsburgh's Lower Hill District adjacent to PPG Paints Arena, has announced its inaugural season lineup with Pittsburgh native Wiz Khalifa headlining the kickoff on October 2. The venue features a general admission floor, balcony seating, and premium hospitality areas, with a season running through January 2027.

data.location: Île de Bendor, Bandol, Provence, France
data.short_description: Zannier Île de Bendor, a 93-key hotel on a private island off Bandol, has opened following a five-year transformation. The project is a collaboration between Société Paul Ricard and Zannier Hotels, reviving the island originally developed by Paul Ricard in 1950. The reopened property includes eight dining spaces, a wellbeing centre, diving centre, and kids' club across three distinct guest settings.
All Smokey Bones locations have closed nationwide after the parent company filed for bankruptcy. No further details were accessible from the article body.
Article could not be fetched (403 error). No business details available.

data.location: Birmingham, Bolton, Lancaster, Swindon, UK (multiple locations)
data.event_date: By end of June 2026 (90 shops); by April 2027 (further 100)
data.short_description: Cancer Research UK is closing 90 charity shops by end of June 2026, with a further 100 closures by April 2027. The organisation cited rising costs and changing shopping habits as reasons, aiming to reduce its shop count to 320 high-performing locations.

Sleep Basil Mattress Co. has launched a new location page targeting Cherry Hills Village shoppers, directing them to its Denver showroom. The locally owned, owner-operated store is run by founders Phil and Josh, who offer personalized mattress consultations and complimentary delivery.

data.location: Star Metals District, West Midtown, Atlanta, GA (east of Howell Mill Road, Marietta Street Artery neighborhood)
data.status: plans to open prior to June 14
data.short_description: LadyBird Westside is an adaptive-reuse restaurant and bar opening in a transformed warehouse in Atlanta's Star Metals District. It is the second location of the Old Fourth Ward establishment and is timed to capture FIFA World Cup foot traffic. The development includes a beer garden, full kitchen and bar, and large greenspaces.

data.location: Star Metals District, West Midtown, Atlanta, GA
data.status: on pace to open by June 14
data.short_description: Incognito is a high-end cocktail bar opening next door to LadyBird Westside in Atlanta's Star Metals District. It is also targeting a pre-June 14 opening to coincide with FIFA World Cup crowds. No further details about the bar's concept were provided.

data.location: Aventura, FL (initial test; broader US rollout noted)
data.short_description: Aldi is testing a redesigned store format developed by Australian design firm Landini Associates, featuring new signage, updated pricing language, and refreshed visuals. The new format is intended as a singular global trading format adaptable across all 11 countries where Aldi South operates. The U.S. test began at an Aventura, Florida location in September 2025.
Article body was not accessible (MSN shell page only). No further business details available.
An Applebee's franchisee has filed for bankruptcy and closed 10 locations, with 53 additional locations reported at risk. No further details were accessible from the article body.
Lammes candy store is abruptly closing all of its locations after 141 years in business. No further details were accessible from the article body.

Marks & Spencer is opening five new food stores across the UK as part of a £90 million investment programme. Locations include stores in Hatfield, Luton, Farnham (Surrey), Abingdon (Oxfordshire), and Godalming (Surrey), with a further Surrey opening anticipated for summer 2026.

data.short_description: See above; this location opened most recently, creating 75 new jobs.

Article covers the Naples, Italy neighborhood of Rione Sanità and a community-led revival of local businesses generally. No specific named business opening or closure event with actionable details was identified.

data.status: Plans To Open 900 New Stores by 2027
data.short_description: Article body was not accessible (MSN shell page only). No location-specific details available.

data.location: Southeast corner of Utica and 14 Mile roads, Fraser, MI
data.short_description: Sheetz is opening its new Fraser, Michigan location on May 8, 2026, with a grand opening celebration including giveaways and a ribbon-cutting from 9–11 a.m. The Fraser store will be open 24 hours offering fuel, food, and convenience items, and represents Sheetz's ninth Michigan location.
A second Sheetz location is also opening in Taylor, Michigan on the same day as the Fraser store. This represents Sheetz's tenth Michigan location. No address beyond the city was specified.
Hillberg & Berk, the official jewellery partner of Team Canada, has opened a new store in Langley. No address or opening date was specified in the available article text.

data.status: closing locations nationwide following bankruptcy filing
data.short_description: A beloved barbecue chain is closing locations nationwide following a bankruptcy filing. Article body was not accessible (MSN shell page only); this appears to be a duplicate/variant of Article 42.
Article could not be fetched (403 error). No business details available.

Playa Bowls is opening a new franchise location at the Water Tower District at Schilling Farms in Collierville, Tennessee on May 9, 2026. The grand opening begins at 11 a.m., with the first 100 guests receiving free bowls and t-shirts. This will be franchisees Amy Lupo and Jack Speed's fourth area location.
Historic candy store chain Lammes is closing all locations after 141 years in business. Article body was not accessible (MSN shell page only); this is a duplicate of Article 50.

data.location: Sault Ste. Marie, MI (address not specified)

Meijer is opening a 159,000-square-foot supercenter in Brownsburg this week. The store sells fresh produce, grocery items, apparel, home goods, electronics, toys, sporting goods, deli, bakery, pharmacy, salon and garden center. It includes house brands and a penny pony ride.

data.location: Jellystone RV Park and Resort on Luke Powers Road in Lake Charles
data.status: move to a larger venue in 2027
data.short_description: McVey’s Seafood Boil-Off will move from Mary’s Lounge to a new larger venue in 2027 due to surging attendance and limited parking/space. The 2027 event will offer more space for teams and festivalgoers with camping options. Official date yet to be announced.

data.location: 835 Rockville Pike, Suite F. at Wintergreen Plaza in Rockville
data.short_description: Tropical Smoothie Cafe is now open at the former Capital Cryo space in Rockville. The chain offers smoothies, wraps, and flatbreads and already has multiple Montgomery County locations. Other businesses expected soon at the plaza.

New Dunkin’ in Fairlawn is set to open its doors Tuesday at 5 a.m. Grand opening includes ribbon-cutting, free coffee/donuts promotions, and $2,000 donation to Special Olympics Virginia. Open daily 5 a.m. to 9 p.m.

data.short_description: Hello Gorgeous Blowouts is now open at Salon and Spa Galleria Azle. Owner Kyndle Noe offers blowouts, styling, extensions, updos, and conditioning treatments. Focuses on making clients feel confident and glamorous.
